name: The Classic Espresso
description: A double shot of our house-blend espresso — bright acidity with a rich caramel finish. Pure and unapologetic.

name: Cortado
description: Equal parts espresso and warm steamed milk. The perfect middle ground between bold and smooth.

name: Flat White
description: Velvety microfoam poured over a double ristretto shot. Richer than a latte with a more intense espresso flavour.

name: Vanilla Oat Latte
description: Our signature latte with house-made vanilla syrup and creamy oat milk. Subtly sweet and dangerously drinkable.

name: Honey Lavender Latte
description: Espresso with lavender-infused honey and steamed milk. Floral and gently sweet — a perennial crowd-pleaser.

name: Dirty Chai
description: A shot of espresso pulled right into a spiced masala chai. Bold meets warming.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Freshly steamed milk with vanilla syrup, a double espresso poured over the top, and a drizzle of house caramel.

name: Cold Brew
description: Steeped for 18 hours in cold water for a naturally sweet and ultra-smooth concentrate. Served over ice.

name: Nitro Cold Brew
description: Our cold brew on nitrogen tap — silky, creamy, and ridiculously smooth with a cascading pour. No milk needed.

name: Iced Brown Sugar Espresso
description: Espresso shaken over ice with brown sugar syrup and a splash of oat milk. Bold and refreshing.

name: Chocolate Mudslide Shake
description: A thick, indulgent shake blending espresso, dark cocoa, house chocolate sauce, and vanilla ice cream.

name: Mango Passionfruit Iced Tea
description: House-brewed green tea shaken with mango and passionfruit puree over ice. Bright and tropical.

name: Strawberry Matcha Latte
description: Ceremonial-grade matcha layered over strawberry cold foam and oat milk. As beautiful as it is delicious.

name: Almond Croissant
description: Our all-butter croissant soaked in almond syrup, filled with frangipane, and topped with flaked almonds. Baked fresh daily.

name: Dark Chocolate Babka
description: A swirled loaf of buttery brioche ribbon with a deep 70% dark chocolate filling. Sold by the thick slice.

name: Cardamom Kouign-Amann
description: A caramelised, laminated pastry with a hint of cardamom and a shatteringly crisp sugar crust.

name: Lemon Ricotta Muffin
description: Moist ricotta muffin with lemon zest, a streusel crumb topping, and a drizzle of lemon glaze.

name: Blueberry Scone
description: Classic buttermilk scone studded with fresh blueberries. Served with clotted cream and house jam on request.

name: Prosciutto & Fig Ciabatta
description: Toasted ciabatta with prosciutto di Parma, fresh fig, whipped ricotta, baby rocket, and a balsamic glaze.

name: Smashed Avocado Sourdough
description: Thick-cut sourdough toasted and loaded with smashed avocado, everything bagel seasoning, chilli flakes, and a soft poached egg.

name: Turkey Pesto Club
description: Layered club on seeded sourdough with sliced turkey, house basil pesto, sun-dried tomato, Swiss cheese, and crisp lettuce.

name: Mushroom & Gruyère Melt
description: Open-faced toasted sourdough with slow-roasted mushrooms, caramelised onion, Gruyère, and fresh thyme.
